hero.title: Expiry tracking that drives action
hero.subtitle: Lifo helps food retailers turn expiration data into clear next steps, before it becomes waste.
hero.subtitle2: Lifo shows your team exactly which food batches need attention so you can discount, donate, or sell before it's too late.

badge.text: Enjoy a one month free trial

expiryTracking.title: Real-time Expiry Tracking
expiryTracking.description: Never miss an expiration date with automated monitoring of your entire inventory.

predictiveAlerts.title: Predictive Alerts
predictiveAlerts.description: Drastically reduce waste with AI-powered notifications before products expire.

timeSaving.title: Time Saving

revenue.subtext: Discount and attract customers to help move products quickly before they expire.

lossReduction.label: Loss Reduction
lossReduction.description: Easily reduce waste and save money
lossReduction.subtext: Fewer expired products while doing less inventory management work.

quickSetup.description: Ready-to-use solution in minutes. We take care of the configuration for you.

freeTrial.description: Test all features with no commitment. Easy cancellation at any time.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: Our team of experts guides you through every step of your journey.

immediateResults.title: Immediate Results
immediateResults.description: Reduce waste and increase profits from the first week of use.

card.title: Ready to transform your inventory management?
card.description: Join lifo to become more resilient and join other stores implementing smart inventory management practices.

featurespage.title: Powerful Features
featurespage.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your inventory efficiently with AI-powered insights and real-time tracking.

dashboard.title: Real-time Dashboard
dashboard.description: Get instant insights into your inventory with our comprehensive dashboard. Track stock levels, monitor expiration dates, and identify trends at a glance. Make informed decisions with real-time data visualization and automated alerts.

scanning.title: Smart Scanning
scanning.description: Effortlessly manage your inventory with our advanced scanning technology. Simply scan to update stock levels, track expiration dates, and maintain accurate records. Works seamlessly on any mobile device.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.description: Understand your business performance with detailed analytics and reporting. Track waste reduction, revenue growth, and operational efficiency. Get actionable insights to optimize your inventory management strategy.

ai.title: AI-Powered Insights
ai.description: Leverage artificial intelligence to optimize your inventory management. Get smart recommendations for reordering, promotional strategies, and waste reduction. Our AI learns from your patterns to provide personalized suggestions.

expiry.title: Expiry Tracking
expiry.description: Never miss expiration dates with automated alerts and lifo management.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: Enterprise-grade security to protect your business data and customer information.

performance.title: Fast Performance
performance.description: Lightning-fast processing and real-time updates for seamless operations.

tracking.title: Simple Integration
tracking.description: Connect with your existing POS system and ERP in minutes

timeSaving.title: Time Savings
timeSaving.description: Automate routine tasks and save hours of manual inventory management.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Multi-user support with role-based permissions and team management.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Inventory?
cta.description: Transform your inventory management with lifo and start reducing waste today.

pricingpage.title: Choose Your Plan
pricingpage.subtitle: Start with our free trial and scale as you grow. No lock-in, full support included.

common.pricingNote: Pricing is subject to change. All fees are to be confirmed.
